{{Infobox event
| name = Slumbering Wraith
| introduced = Reaper
}}

''See also: [[Slumbering Wraith Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Slumbering Wraith, also known as [[Subject One]], is a powerful entity and one of the four [[Dreadgods]]. While it can appear as a ghost-like manifestation or resemble a [[Remnant]], it is actually a [[Striker technique]] possessing its own independent will. [[The Wraith]] is characterized by an insatiable hunger for all things, including death, and possesses a suction-like authority that consumes power. It serves as the master of a [[labyrinth]], with its presence able to command the structure's gates. The entity is associated with various powerful artifacts, including its core binding, a horn that warps the air and transforms animals into [[dreadbeasts]], and an arm that can be attached to a person. This limb possesses its own appetite and can sense the struggles of other [[Dreadgods]]. While a core binding can be used to facilitate the rebirth of a [[Dreadgod]], there is a risk that an individual fusing with such a [[binding]] could be permanently replaced by the entity. The Slumbering Wraith's power is tied to the existence of [[Monarchs]]; if they were removed from the world, its [[hunger aura]] would dissipate, allowing for rest.}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Known as [[Subject One]], the Slumbering Wraith is a spirit-like [[Striker technique]] originating from the Devourer itself. This entity possesses a palpable eye and harbors a hunger for all things, including death. During a confrontation with [[Lindon]], the wraith produces an echo capable of blessing him. Following its potential death or the release of its contents, [[Lindon]] occupies the being's throne and emerges with its power under his control.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Slumbering Wraith]] is an attack from the Devourer itself and is known as [[Subject One]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Slumbering Wraith]] is a [[Striker technique]] that acts like a spirit.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Slumbering Wraith]] hungers for all things, even death.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Slumbering Wraith]] has an eye that can be felt.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] faces the [[Slumbering Wraith]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Slumbering Wraith]] has an echo that can bless [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Slumbering Wraith]] may have died or released what it was holding.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Slumbering Wraith]] is a being whose throne [[Lindon]] occupies.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] emerged with the power of the [[Slumbering Wraith]] under control.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Slumbering Wraith]]'s will is noticeable in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Slumbering Wraith]]'s limb can sense the struggle of its brother.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Slumbering Wraith]] possesses hunger.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Slumbering Wraith is a [[Dreadgod]] that once possessed immense strength, which was later inherited by the [[Wandering Titan]]. A stylized depiction of this entity marks the largest [[gate]] within the [[labyrinth]], though the Slumbering Wraith has since died. Following its death, [[Lindon]] begins to become the Slumbering Wraith through a process involving a core binding. As part of his body is constructed from the entity, flesh grows out of [[Lindon]], and he eventually utilizes the Slumbering Wraith's right hand to consume earth madra. Additionally, the entity served as the source for one of [[Northstrider]]'s limbs.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Slumbering Wraith]] is a [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Slumbering Wraith]] is a source of a limb for [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Wandering Titan]] is a copy of the [[Wandering Titan]] from before the [[Dreadgods]] inherited the [[Slumbering Wraith]]’s strength.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The largest [[gate]] into the [[labyrinth]] is etched with a stylized depiction of the [[Slumbering Wraith]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Slumbering Wraith]] has died.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is becoming the [[Slumbering Wraith]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Slumbering Wraith]] has a core binding.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has part of his body made from the [[Slumbering Wraith]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses the right hand of the [[Slumbering Wraith]] to consume earth madra.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Slumbering Wraith]]’s flesh grew out of [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[The more he gets taken over…] “...the more he becomes the Slumbering Wraith.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
